powerpagecomponent.content:
{
  "display_name": "FetchXML - Values by Branch",
  "type": 756150001,
  "value": "<!-- bogus -->
{% fetchxml valuesByBranchQuery %}
<fetch aggregate="true">
  <entity name="lv_lvcompcommissionvalue">
    <attribute name="lv_amount" alias="total" aggregate="sum" />
    <attribute name="lv_description" alias="desc" groupby="true" />
    <attribute name="lv_branchlookup" alias="branch_id" groupby="true" />
    <filter type="and">
		  <condition attribute="lv_regionlookup" operator="eq" value="{{currentRegion.accountid}}" />
      <condition attribute="lv_periodno" operator="eq" value="{{sqUISelPeriodNo}}" />
    </filter>
    <link-entity name="lv_lvcompbranch" from="lv_lvcompbranchid" to="lv_branchlookup" link-type="inner" alias="branch">
			<attribute name="lv_code" alias="code" groupby="true"/>
			<attribute name="lv_name" alias="name" groupby="true"/>
		</link-entity>
  </entity>
</fetch>
{% endfetchxml %}
{% assign valuesByBranch = valuesByBranchQuery.results.entities %}
<!-- bogus -->

"
}
powerpagecomponent.name: FetchXML - Values by Branch
